allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.read\(\).strip\(\).split\('\\n'\) for line in lines[-30:]: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('role', ''\) content = obj.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, str\) and content.strip\(\): print\(f'[{role}]: {content[:500]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, list\): for item in content: if isinstance\(item, dict\) and item.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'[{role}]: {item[\\"text\\"][:500]}'\) except: pass ")
